title: Sherry In The Saddle.
content:
Sherry's not in saddle,
    Sherry's not in saddle,
    Zip-zip-zip! Zip-zip-zip!
    Rat-tat-tat! Rat-tat-tat!
    Boys in blue skedaddle,
    Boys in blue skedaddle,
    Zip-zip-zip! Zip-zip-zip!
    Rat-tat-tat! Rat-tat-tat!
    Sherry's not in saddle,
    Sherry's not in saddle,
    The Southron gray
    Is King to-day,
    For Sherry's not in saddle.

    Sherry's in the saddle,
    Sherry's in the saddle,
    Zip-zip-zip! Zip-zip-zip!
    Rat-tat-tat! Rat-tat-tat!
    Boys in gray skedaddle,
    Boys in gray skedaddle,
    Zip-zip-zip! Zip-zip-zip!
    Rat-tat-tat! Rat-tat-tat!
    Sherry's in the saddle,
    Sherry's in the saddle,
    The Southron gray
    Bites grass to-day,
    For Sherry's in the saddle,

    Sherry in the saddle,
    Sherry in the saddle,
    Zip-zip-zip! Zip-zip-zip!
    Rat-tat-tat! Rat-tat-tat!
    Union foes skedaddle,
    Union foes skedaddle,
    Zip-zip-zip! Zip-zip-zip!
    Rat-tat-tat! Rat-tat-tat!
    Sherry in the saddle,
    Sherry in the saddle,
    By night or day,
    'Twixt Blue and Gray,
    There's hell to pay,
    When Sherry's in the saddle.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, A. H. Laidlaw delivers a powerful performance in "Sherry In The Saddle."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
